instruction: Find the newest email in Inbox whose subject contains "verification code" and export its raw MIME to "$HOME/Desktop/mail_export_5_1.eml". If no match exists, write "none" to that file.
reference_command: all=$(for p in {1..50}; do out=$(himalaya envelope list --folder Inbox --page "$p" --page-size 100 -o json 2>/dev/null || true); [ -z "$out" ] && break; [ "$out" = "[]" ] && break; echo "$out"; done); if [ -z "$all" ]; then id=""; else id=$(printf '%s\n' "$all" | jq -s -r 'add | [.[] | select((.subject // "") | test("verification code";"i"))][0].id // empty'); fi; if [ -n "$id" ]; then himalaya message export --folder Inbox "$id" --full > "$HOME/Desktop/mail_export_5_1.eml"; else printf 'none\n' > "$HOME/Desktop/mail_export_5_1.eml"; fi

parameters.expected_command: all=$(for p in {1..50}; do out=$(himalaya envelope list --folder Inbox --page "$p" --page-size 100 -o json 2>/dev/null || true); [ -z "$out" ] && break; [ "$out" = "[]" ] && break; echo "$out"; done); if [ -z "$all" ]; then id=""; else id=$(printf '%s\n' "$all" | jq -s -r 'add | [.[] | select((.subject // "") | test("verification code";"i"))][0].id // empty'); fi; if [ -n "$id" ]; then himalaya message export --folder Inbox "$id" --full; else printf 'none\n'; fi
